jobs.name: robert_half
jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer III
jobs.description: Engineering an enterprise-scale component library containing 100+ high-performance, customer-facing web components, integrating complex third-party APIs, with 300+ variants to standardize UI across multiple products and accelerate development cycles. Architecting and deploying secure, serverless AWS APIs using CDK, Lambda, API Gateway, and S3 to expose component data, serving as the team's primary resource for cloud infrastructure. Leading the migration of core codebases from GitLab to GitHub while automating end-to-end build/release lifecycles, significantly reducing manual overhead and streamlining workflows. Reducing website load times by optimizing the critical rendering path, bundle sizes, and CSS delivery, significantly improving Core Web Vitals and Lighthouse scores. Minimizing product bugs and resolving bottlenecks by leading the implementation of automated UI visual testing and processes to improve development and testing cycles.

jobs.name: buzzable
jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description: Spearheaded the development of core product features using React, resulting in a 20% boost in user acquisition through cross-functional collaboration with product and business teams. Designed foundational REST API endpoints using Node.js, establishing the core backend infrastructure during the company's early stages to support initial user scaling.
